## What does this PR do?

<!-- Provide a concise summary of the change. If it resolves an issue, link it: -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking, fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking, adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor (no behaviour change, improves structure/readability)
- [ ] 📝 Docs / comments only
- [ ] 🔧 CI / tooling / config

## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format .` has been run (or pre-commit hook confirmed clean)
- [ ] `flutter analyze --fatal-infos` passes with no new issues
- [ ] `flutter test` passes locally
- [ ] New/changed code is covered by tests (unit, widget, or integration)
- [ ] If I changed a widget with a golden test, I've regenerated the baseline and committed the new PNG
- [ ] If I changed a provider or model with `@riverpod`/`@freezed`, I ran `build_runner` and committed the generated `.g.dart`/`.freezed.dart` files
- [ ] The PR title follows Conventional Commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
